creator: aaz@q-fu.com
text:
Created attachment 225378
update to 4.49.1

A recent update to pango port dropped support for pcf bitmap fonts, so terminus can't be used in applications relying on pango anymore. Some upstream discussion: https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/pango/-/issues/386

This updated version of terminus includes otb format fonts which are still supported.
